text:
Created attachment 236607
Patch 10.0.2 to 10.0.3

This is a patch release of www/glpi from 10.0.2 to 10.0.3.

This is a security release, upgrading is recommended (8 security fixes, 2 critical).

ChangeLog

- https://github.com/glpi-project/glpi/releases/tag/10.0.3

Also attached the Poudriere testport logs.
